title: Ubiquiti UISP Dual-Power Injector
description: Versatile PoE adapter that delivers 48V DC passive PoE up to 100W to power any two Wave models and provides 2.5 Gbps connectivity. Power method is by Power TransPort DC input 27V DC Supported Wave models Wave AP Wave AP Micro Wave Long-Range Wave Nano Wave Pro Wave Pico
